extensibility_patterns.description: Custom tools and workflows that integrate directly into the ArcGIS Pro interface, providing new commands, buttons, panes, and dockable windows.
Customize ArcGIS Pro's UI, startup, and user roles for tailored experiences.
Integrate custom data formats into ArcGIS Pro for querying, analysis, and mapping as tables or feature classes.
Build standalone console or WPF apps using ArcGIS Pro SDK for geometry and geodatabase operations, without ArcGIS Pro.

arcpy_modules.name: arcpy.mp (Mapping)
arcpy_modules.description: Module for manipulating the contents of existing project files (*.aprx) or layer files (*.lyrx). Available to all licenses.

arcpy_modules.name: arcpy.un (Utility Network)
arcpy_modules.description: Module for managing subnetwork controller assignment and associations between network features. Available with ArcGIS Utility Network extension license.

arcpy_modules.name: arcpy.sa (Spatial Analyst)
arcpy_modules.description: Module for analyzing raster and vector data with the functionality provided by the ArcGIS Spatial Analyst extension.

arcpy_modules.name: arcpy.nax (Network Analyst)
arcpy_modules.description: Modern, easy-to-use Python module for working with network analysis functionality provided with the ArcGIS Network Analyst extension.

arcpy_modules.name: arcpy.metadata
arcpy_modules.description: Module for accessing and managing an item's metadata. Automate workflows for managing standards-compliant geospatial metadata.

geoprocessing_tools.organization: Tools are grouped into toolsets, which are then collected into toolboxes

tool_errors_warnings.description: Geoprocessing errors and warnings are delivered as a six-digit code and a text message

environments.description: Environment settings can be applied to tools and affect their results

arcgis_workflow_manager.description: An enterprise workflow system that supports both GIS and non-GIS business processes, typically involving multiple users and taking days to weeks to complete
arcgis_workflow_manager.licensing: Requires ArcGIS Pro installation, ArcGIS Workflow Manager extension for ArcGIS Pro, and a deployment of ArcGIS Workflow Manager Server or an ArcGIS Workflow Manager organization extension

tasks.description: Preconfigured steps that guide a single user through a repeatable GIS process using functionality in ArcGIS Pro, typically taking minutes to hours to complete
tasks.licensing: Requires only ArcGIS Pro installation, no additional licensing needed

utility_network.description: A comprehensive framework of functionality in ArcGIS for modeling utility systems such as electric, gas, water, storm water, wastewater, and telecommunications
api_characteristics: DML-only API (schema creation/modification requires geoprocessing API)
Most methods should be called on the Main CIM Thread (MCT)
Uses unmanaged resources that must be explicitly released via Dispose pattern
key_components: UtilityNetwork class - Root object for API access
Definition and schema (UtilityNetworkDefinition, Domain networks, Tiers, Network sources)
Network topology - Routines that query the topological index
Associations - Routines that query and edit relationships
Subnetworks - Classes and routines for subnetworks
Network diagrams - Query and edit network diagrams
Pro integration - Integration with other parts of Pro SDK

core_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Core.dll
core_assemblies.description: Provides CIM, Geodatabase, Geometry and Utility Network APIs.

core_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.CoreHost.dll
core_assemblies.description: Provides Host.Initialize to initialize ArcGIS.Core.dll for stand-alone use.

core_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Framework.dll
core_assemblies.description: Provides the application framework to include add-in contracts, DAML support, and base classes. This assembly must be referenced by every add-in.

core_assemblies.name: ESRI.ArcGIS.ItemIndex.dll
core_assemblies.description: Provides functionality to create and work with Custom items.

extension_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Catalog.dll
extension_assemblies.description: Provides access to project content items (map items, layout items, style items, folder items, and so on).

extension_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Core.dll
extension_assemblies.description: Provides functionality to create and manage projects, access to events associated with the current project, and the ability to execute geoprocessing tools.

extension_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Editing.dll
extension_assemblies.description: Provides access to the editing environment and core editing functionality required for custom edit tool implementations.

extension_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Geoprocessing.dll
extension_assemblies.description: Provides access to geoprocessing history items stored in the project.

extension_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Layouts.dll
extension_assemblies.description: Provides functionality for manipulating elements on a layout and exporting to a variety of image formats.

extension_assemblies.name: ArcGIS.Desktop.Mapping.dll
extension_assemblies.description: Provides types to create maps and layers, label features, perform query operations, and visualize them in 2D or 3D.
